/tmp/codeql-scratch-a47d403e12af8553/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Sandbox.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Sandbox.dir/source/main.cpp.o -o Sandbox  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/HarmonyEngine/HarmonyEngine/_codeql_build_dir/_deps/flecs-build ../Harmony/libHarmony.a ../_deps/flecs-build/libflecs.so ../_deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a ../_deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a
